title: Library of Congress: Constitution Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for Constitution-related primary sources and civic reading.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: Library of Congress Constitution materials help students examine founding documents, debate, ratification, amendments, and the changing meaning of civic principles.
Use this source for close reading, vocabulary work, claim-evidence reasoning, and connecting constitutional ideas to later historical debates.
Many founding-era documents are public domain, but LOC item pages should still be checked for rights, transcription notes, and image-use guidance.
